result_text:
=== Units.coeHom comp (20 matches) ===

вҖў MulHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  [Mul M] [Mul N] [Mul P] (g : N вҶ’вӮҷ* P) (f : M вҶ’вӮҷ* N) : вҶ‘(g.comp f) = g вҲҳ f

вҖў OneHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  [One M] [One N] [One P] (g : OneHom N P) (f : OneHom M N) : вҶ‘(g.comp f) = g вҲҳ f

вҖў AddHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  вҲҖ {M : Type u_4} {N : Type u_5} {P : Type u_6} [inst : Add M] [inst_1 : Add N] [inst_2 : Add P] (g : N вҶ’вӮҷ+ P)
  (f : M вҶ’вӮҷ+ N), вҮ‘(g.comp f) = вҮ‘g вҲҳ вҮ‘f

вҖў Units.coeHom [definition]
  : MЛЈ вҶ’* M

вҖў Units.map_comp [theorem]
  (f : M вҶ’* N) (g : N вҶ’* P) : map (g.comp f) = (map g).comp (map f)

вҖў Continuous.of_coeHom_comp [theorem]
  [Group G] [Monoid H] [TopologicalSpace G] [TopologicalSpace H] [ContinuousInv G] {f : G вҶ’* HЛЈ}
  (hf : Continuous ((Units.coeHom H).comp f)) : Continuous f

вҖў ZeroHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  вҲҖ {M : Type u_4} {N : Type u_5} {P : Type u_6} [inst : Zero M] [inst_1 : Zero N] [inst_2 : Zero P] (g : ZeroHom N P)
  (f : ZeroHom M N), вҮ‘(g.comp f) = вҮ‘g вҲҳ вҮ‘f

вҖў MonoidHom.toHomUnitsMulEquiv [definition]
  : (G вҶ’* M) вүғ* (G вҶ’* MЛЈ)

вҖў AddUnits.coeHom [definition]
  (M : Type u) вҶ’ [inst : AddMonoid M] вҶ’ AddUnits M вҶ’+ M

вҖў Units.coeHom_apply [theorem]
  (x : MЛЈ) : coeHom M x = вҶ‘x

вҖў NonUnitalRingHom.coe_comp_mulHom [theorem]
  (g : ОІ вҶ’вӮҷ+* Оі) (f : Оұ вҶ’вӮҷ+* ОІ) : MulHom.mk (g вҲҳ f) (g.comp f).map_mul' = (g : ОІ вҶ’вӮҷ* Оі).comp f

вҖў CoheytingHom.coe_comp [theorem]
  (f : CoheytingHom ОІ Оі) (g : CoheytingHom Оұ ОІ) : вҮ‘(f.comp g) = f вҲҳ g

вҖў AddMonoidHom.coe_toHomAddUnits [theorem]
  вҲҖ {G : Type u_1} {M : Type u_2} [inst : AddGroup G] [inst_1 : AddMonoid M] (f : G вҶ’+ M) (g : G),
  вҶ‘(f.toHomAddUnits g) = f g

вҖў Units.map [definition]
  (f : M вҶ’* N) : MЛЈ вҶ’* NЛЈ

вҖў AddUnits.coeHom_apply [theorem]
  вҲҖ {M : Type u} [inst : AddMonoid M] (x : AddUnits M), (AddUnits.coeHom M) x = вҶ‘x

вҖў IsUnit.liftRight [definition]
  (f : M вҶ’* N) (hf : вҲҖ x, IsUnit (f x)) : M вҶ’* NЛЈ

вҖў Units.coe_map [theorem]
  (f : M вҶ’* N) (x : MЛЈ) : вҶ‘(map f x) = f x

вҖў IsUnit.coe_liftRight [theorem]
  (f : M вҶ’* N) (hf : вҲҖ x, IsUnit (f x)) (x) : (IsUnit.liftRight f hf x : N) = f x

вҖў NonUnitalRingHom.coe_toMulHom [theorem]
  (f : Оұ вҶ’вӮҷ+* ОІ) : вҮ‘f.toMulHom = f

вҖў MulHom.coeFn [definition]
  (Оұ ОІ : Type*) [Mul Оұ] [CommSemigroup ОІ] : (Оұ вҶ’вӮҷ* ОІ) вҶ’вӮҷ* Оұ вҶ’ ОІ
